headline: Regeneron R&D Updates Test Market View On Long Term Pipeline Value
summary: Regeneron Pharmaceuticals (NasdaqGS:REGN) reported positive early-stage trial results for Lynozyfic in systemic AL amyloidosis, with high response rates and signs of organ function improvement. The European Medicines Agency accepted Otarmeni, a gene therapy candidate for OTOF-related hearing loss, for accelerated review as a potential first treatment of its kind in Europe. These twin updates arrive at a time when NasdaqGS:REGN is trading at $638.88, with the stock down 8.5% over the past...
